headline: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Stock Fair Value Edges Higher After Analyst Target Increases
summary: Analysts have recently lifted fair value estimates for Marathon Petroleum, with one model pointing to an updated assessment of US$271.59 per share compared with a prior US$265.06. Higher price targets from firms such as Wells Fargo are being linked to views on refining margins, updated strip pricing through 2027, and company specific developments like the Garyville refinery visit and capital plans. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader analyst narrative...
